# `nise store`

- **Usage**: `nise store <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/store/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/store/mod.rs)

Manage the nise store

## Subcommands

- [`nise store doctor [--deep] [-J --json]`](/cli/store/doctor.md)
- [`nise store gc [FLAGS]`](/cli/store/gc.md)
- [`nise store repair [FLAGS]`](/cli/store/repair.md)

Examples:

```
$ nise store doctor
Store: ~/.local/share/mise/nise/store
Status: not initialized

$ NISE_STORE_DIR=/nise/store nise store doctor --json

$ nise store gc --dry-run

$ nise store repair --remove-broken-refs
```
